description: Fragment of a letter to 'my brother.' In Judaeo-Arabic. Mostly urgings to write back and expressions of longing. Apparently sent from Qūṣ. The response should be sent to the shop of Abū l-Majīd. The sender describes the severity of his or her longing for the addressee on the holiday ("my tears preceded my words... my [...] cried out till they nearly died of crying out"). (Information in part from CUDL.)
